goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'theatre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 11:45' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of theatre
Make sure you get address and area
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should go to cambridge
The train should leave after 11:45 and should depart from bishops stortford
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
